ddt:Target.Name: UCH - X65 Phase 2_Soft4.1à5.2
ddt:Target.Description: UCH X65 Phase 2 Base DDT pour Version soft UCH = Soft 4.1 Soft 4.3 Soft 4.7 Soft 4.8 Soft 5.2 Contact : M. DEPIRE tel 01 30 03 24 31
